title: RailCore official community modpack
description: This is the official modpack for RailCore community server!
body: This is the RailCore official community modpack, it contains all the content to build cities,railways with also role-play features. This will be the modpack used for our minecraft server! There are mods like create, steam and rails, pantograph and wires,etc. to build realistic railways, copycats+, framed blocks and create:extended train decor (a custom mod made by me that adds decoration for trains and railways to build realistic trains. Yuushia townscape and other building mods to build your city and many optimization mods to keep this heavy modpack running even with shaders! It's recommended to allocate at least 8gb of ram.
